title: Ask
subtitle: A conversation with Claude, right here at home

hero.headline: Think out loud — let Claude think with you.
hero.body: Recipes, gift ideas, admin doubts, plain explanations. Your trusted assistant lives here.

fallback.title: Open Claude in a dedicated window
fallback.body: Claude.ai can't be embedded directly for security. Opening it in a new tab keeps the conversation alive until you close it.
fallback.note: The session lives on claude.ai: you stay signed in to your own account.

suggestions.title: Try asking
items: What can I cook with what's in the fridge?
